scripts.build: npm run build -w @epis2/contracts && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-domain && npm run build -w @epis2/design-system && npm run build -w @epis2/command-registry && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-forms && npm run build -w @epis2/epis2-widgets && npm run build -w @epis2/epis2-ui && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-productivity && npm run build -w @epis2/test-fixtures && npm run build -w @epis2/fhir-export && npm run build -w @epis2/ai-client && npm run build -w @epis2/local-ai && npm run build -w @epis2/drug-intel && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-case-intel && npm run build -w @epis2/api && npm run build -w @epis2/web
scripts.build:ci-fixtures-chain: npm run build -w @epis2/contracts && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-domain && npm run build -w @epis2/command-registry && npm run build -w @epis2/test-fixtures
scripts.test: npm run build -w @epis2/contracts && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-domain && npm run build -w @epis2/design-system && npm run build -w @epis2/command-registry && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-forms && npm run build -w @epis2/epis2-widgets && npm run build -w @epis2/epis2-ui && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-productivity && npm run build -w @epis2/test-fixtures && npm run build -w @epis2/fhir-export && vitest run
scripts.check: eslint . && npm run tool:script -- typecheck && node scripts/architecture/validate-all.mjs
